results.code:
209 
210     def verify_token(
211         self,
212         token: str,
213         expected_token_use: str = "access",
214     ) -> dict[str, Any]:
215         """Verify and decode a FastMCP token.
216 
217         Validates JWT signature, expiration, issuer, audience, and token type.
218 
219         Args:
220             token: JWT token to verify
221             expected_token_use: Expected token type ("access" or "refresh").
222                 Defaults to "access", which rejects refresh tokens.
223 
224         Returns:
225             Decoded token payload
226 
227         Raises:
228             JoseError: If token is invalid, expired, or has wrong claims
229         """
230         try:
231             # Decode and verify signature
232             payload = self._jwt.decode(token, self._signing_key)
233 
234             # Validate token type
235             token_use = payload.get("token_use", "access")
236             if token_use != expected_token_use:
237                 logger.debug(
238                     "Token type mismatch: expected %s, got %s",
239                     expected_token_use,
240                     token_use,
241                 )
242                 raise JoseError(
243                     f"Token type mismatch: expected {expected_token_use}, "
244                     f"got {token_use}"
245                 )
246 
247             # Validate expiration
248             exp = payload.get("exp")
249             if exp is not None and exp < time.time():
250                 logger.debug("Token expired")
251                 raise JoseError("Token has expired")
252 
253             # Validate issuer
254             if payload.get("iss") != self.issuer:
255                 logger.debug("Token has invalid issuer")
256                 raise JoseError("Invalid token issuer")
257 
258             # Validate audience
259             if payload.get("aud") != self.audience:
260                 logger.debug("Token has invalid audience")
261                 raise JoseError("Invalid token audience")
262 
263             logger.debug(
264                 "Token verified successfully for subject=%s", payload.get("sub")
265             )
266             return payload
267 
268         except JoseError as e:
269             logger.debug("Token validation failed: %s", e)
270             raise
